metadata.title: Tango: Live Stream, Video Chat
metadata.short_description: Live Chat & Match! Explore Real-Time Dating and Make Friends!
metadata.long_description:
Tango is a vibrant LIVE social community with over 500M users worldwide!

Connect with new friends, go live anytime, and enjoy nonstop entertainment from talented creators streaming 24/7!

It's the ultimate platform to make real connections, engage in live video chats, and join the new wave of social communication.

Explore, watch, chat, and use our live video streams to make lasting friendships and build your community.
Whether you want to meet new friends, discover unique content, or support your favorite Creators, Tango is the place to be!

Why Tango?

🌍 Global Community: Connect with random people worldwide and discover a diverse, creative community. Tango is where communities are formed - THE place to make new friends.

📹 Live Video Chats: Enjoy real-time video chats with friends and creators. Our live chat features allow you to interact and share moments as they happen.

🤳🏻 Live Streaming: Stream your special moments, watch content you’ll love, and live video chat with your favorite Creators. Become a part of the live-streaming revolution and make real friends through engaging content.

🌟 Creator & Fan Community: Tango enables creators to build their community and connect with fans like never before. Discover and support talented Creators by watching their incredible streams.

Tango makes it easy to meet real people to chat, connect, and enjoy real conversations anytime.

Join Us If You:
* Want to watch live streams and interact with hosts in real-time
* Enjoy online music concerts and social hangs
* Like chatting with random people from around the world
* Want to meet and chat live with friends or creators
* Watch gaming live streams and discuss strategies
* Are interested in becoming an influencer & showcasing your talents
* Are looking to find new friends and build real connections
* Want to explore new, trendy content and discover talented Creators
* Enjoy exciting and interactive live audio chats
* Want to experience seamless real-time translation for easy communication with people worldwide!

Features:
🎧 Try NEW Audio Rooms: Exciting and Interactive! Chat live, share ideas, and connect with your community. Create your space, invite listeners, and have fun!

💑 Introducing Tango Match: Discover live dates with Tango Match and connect with new friends in an exciting and interactive way.

🗣️Live Video Chat: Connect 1-on-1 or create group video chats with up to 9 people. Meet locals or discover friends from around the globe. Enjoy fun video chats with interactive face filters.

🤳🏻 VLOG (Video Blog): Share your life, talents, and experiences. Grow your following and become a popular vlogger on Tango!

🎮 Gaming: Stream or watch popular games. Join the excitement and connect with other gaming enthusiasts in our community!

🌍 Support for Multiple Languages & Real-Time Translation
No worries about language barriers - our real-time translation makes it easy to connect with everyone!

Join millions of satisfied users who have found friends and community on Tango. Our users love the interactive features and the ability to connect with random people worldwide.

Your feedback helps us improve!
Any Questions? Please contact us at support@tango.me

Join the Tango Community! It's time to make real connections, build your community, and join the largest live-streaming platform!
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@tango.me.app?_t=ZS-8tRSqsXyA1w&_r=1
X: https://x.com/tangome?s=21

Download Tango now and join the fun!

Mountain View, CA 94041
